programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it has been inhabited for thousands of years, by people as well as animals, and shows no sign of losing popularity with either.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
programme.desc: It's home to some of the world's most iconic animals  including the African great apes.
programme.sub-title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

programme.title: Black or White
programme.desc: A heart-wrenching drama starring Academy Award Winners Octavia Spencer and Kevin Costner. When Elliot is left to care for his granddaughter Eloise by himself, Eloise’s paternal grandmother seeks custody, drawing them into a long and uncertain battle.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Mel Gibson ("Lethal Weapon") stars as a troubled husband and executive who adopts a beaver hand-puppet as his sole means of communication.

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: From Time To Time
programme.desc: In 1940s England, Tolly is sent to the country house of his grandmother whilst his mother searches for his missing father. Tolly soon finds that he can pass through time and becomes caught up in the family mysteries that still echo in his own time...

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Black or White
programme.desc: A heart-wrenching drama starring Academy Award Winners Octavia Spencer and Kevin Costner. When Elliot is left to care for his granddaughter Eloise by himself, Eloise’s paternal grandmother seeks custody, drawing them into a long and uncertain battle.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: Paul Conroy wakes up six feet underground with no idea of who put him there or why. Buried with only a cell phone and lighter, his worst enemies are bad reception, a rapidly draining battery, and low oxygen. Paul only has ninety minutes to be rescued.

programme.title: Bless The Child
programme.desc: Cody, a little girl abandoned by her mother and raised by her aunt, a nurse, is kidnapped. The girl's guardian, aided by an F.B.I. agent, learn that Cody has supernatural abilities. Feat: Kim Basinger, Jimmy Smits & Rufus Sewell.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is just your average, undercover super-assassin. When he meets Jen, he finds true love. But a picture-perfect marriage won't save Spencer from becoming a target himself. Now Spencer and Jen are on the run for their lives.

programme.title: The Crawling Eye
programme.desc: Things start to look eerily familiar to scientists Crevett and Brooks when mountain climbers begin losing their heads in the Trollenberg Mountains.

programme.title: The Phantom Planet
programme.desc: When US astronaut Captain Frank Chapman’s military spaceship is damaged by asteroids, he lands safely on the giant asteroid Rheton.

programme.title: The Human Duplicators
programme.desc: An alien takes over a professor's mansion-basement laboratory, and makes android clones to infiltrate the government.

programme.title: Outlaw of Gor
programme.desc: A hero and loser friend are transplanted to the planet of Gor by mysterious forces and are soon caught up in an evil sorcerer's plot of dastardly evil.

programme.title: The Wild Wild World of Batwoman
programme.desc: In this lower-than-low budget film, Batwoman enlists her band of go-go dancing Batgirls to protect the Atomic Hearing Aid from the rotten Rat Fink.

programme.title: The Beatniks
programme.desc: When a hold-up carried out by his hoodlum friends goes tragically awry, Eddie Crane’s bright future as a recording artist could be in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Unearthly
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates havoc when an experiment to stop the aging process goes awry.

programme.title: The Sword And The Dragon
programme.desc: A Russian hero plots an invasion against the Mongols in The Sword and the Dragon. Mike and the Bots create their own topical comedy show, reenact the table cloth scene from the movie, and try their hand at playing Dungeons and Dragons.

programme.title: The Slime People
programme.desc: The crew puts Commando Cody on trial for crimes against reality after watching the sixth episode of Radar Men while slime monsters invade Los Angeles in The Slime People.

programme.title: Lost Continent
programme.desc: A military team sent to search for a lost rocket ends up trapped on a mountain inhabited by dinosaurs in Lost Continent.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 193
programme.desc: Does a driver's choice of footwear affect driving performance? Does a full bladder pose as much of a driving hazard as being legally intoxicated? Can superglue be used to turn a room upside down?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 2
programme.desc: Myths tested: Will using a cell phone near a gas pump cause an explosion? Will silicone breast implants explode or expand in low pressure? Can a standard CD-ROM drive shatter a CD?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 154
programme.desc: Does pepper spray, a flannel shirt and a stun gun cause a massive fireball? Can fireworks really launch a person over a lake?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 36
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is the brace position recommended in airplane crashes actually designed to kill people? Is driving while talking on the phone as dangerous as driving drunk?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 56
programme.desc: Myths tested: Did Archimedes make a cannon using steam power? Is a cardboard cereal box more nutritious than the sugary cereal inside?

programme.title: MythBusters: Top 25 Almost Special
programme.desc: The top 25 moments of "MythBusters" are counted down by the cast with additional comments.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 122
programme.desc: Could a torture technique consisting of growing a bamboo through a victim's body have worked? Does dropping alkali metals in a water-filled bathtub result in a huge explosion?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 211
programme.desc: Will a crab pot drag you overboard if your foot is caught in a coil? Is it better to work a 30-hour grind with no sleep than with a 20-minute nap every 6 hours?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 46
programme.desc: Myths tested: What is the best cure for seasickness? Is it more efficient to drive a truck with its tailgate up than down? Can sticking one's finger in a gun barrel stop a bullet?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 215
programme.desc: Can a room be painted using explosives via Adam's snowflake frame or Jamie's steel sphere? Can a boat be split in two by a channel marker?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 123
programme.desc: Can a car bumper explode? Did Hungarian archers get twice the penetration shooting a bow from a galloping horse?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 10
programme.desc: Myths tested: Do frozen chickens cause more damage than thawed chickens when shot at a plane's windshield? Did a man die trying to compact his laundry in the washing machine by standing on it?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 15
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is Jimmy Hoffa buried under Giants Stadium? Can the venom from a daddy long-legs kill a human? Can a jet engine launch a taxi into the air?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 82
programme.desc: Myths tested: Was the Hindenburg disaster actually caused by the doping compound with which the LZ 129 Hindenburg was painted? Can running in a zig-zag line save a person from a crocodile?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 35
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a jet pack be created from plans on the internet? Do pyramids have special powers?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 225
programme.desc: When two cars try to knock each other off the road, does it always result in a difficult duel? Is the silver screen trick of tipping up on to two wheels and driving sideways as easy as it seems?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 23
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a heated jawbreaker explode when bitten down on? Can a PVC pipe build enough static electricity to kill? Can a playing card kill a person if thrown with enough power?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Sinking Room Escape, Santa's Worst Nightmare, Pipe Ramp Roof Slide
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound to a chair suspended over the water. Then, dressed in a dog bite protection suit, contestants must climb out of a chimney and face Santa's worst Christmas ever in this special holiday episode.
programme.sub-title: Sinking Room Escape, Santa's Worst Nightmare, Pipe Ramp Roof Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tarzan Semi To Semi, Fear Factor Donut Shop, Falling Beam Maze
programme.desc: Contestants stand on top of moving trucks, then play a game to determine how many disgusting donuts they will have to eat.
programme.sub-title: Tarzan Semi To Semi, Fear Factor Donut Shop, Falling Beam Maze

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Couples Hang, Tuna Transfer
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under helicopters. In another, each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Double Eat & Yank, Gross Catapult
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, the contestants will stand at a podium on the roof of a 5 story building. The first contestant loads a piece of cow stomach onto a catapult, which will then launch the stomach down to their partner.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Blind Driving Race To Truck,Double Tunnel Flush
programme.desc: A male contestant's head is placed through a hole cut into the bottom of a slightly angled sewer pipe with his arms shackled around the outside of the pipe, among other exciting stunts.
programme.sub-title: Blind Driving Race To Truck,Double Tunnel Flush

programme.title: Fear Factor: Weighted Ski Boot Rescue, Block Head
programme.desc: Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads will be placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats. In another stunt, one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above water wearing weighted boots.
programme.sub-title: Weighted Ski Boot Rescue, Block Head

programme.title: Fear Factor: Fear Factor Triathlon, Electric Maze
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Train Lean and Grab, Gross Gorge
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, each contestant will stand on a beam suspended in the air off the sides of a train box car. Then, in a banquet room, couples will feed each other as much disgusting food as they can.
programme.sub-title: Train Lean and Grab, Gross Gorge

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat Helicopter Truck Car Jump,Bullfrog Coffin
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will ride on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. The male contestant will be placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.
programme.sub-title: Boat Helicopter Truck Car Jump,Bullfrog Coffin

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Rope Transfer,Tumbler Cage,Gross Obstacle Course,Up & Over Car Ramp
programme.desc: A rope will be suspended between two helicopters. Contestants will be standing in a tall cage. Contestants must discover a key to a box of worms', which will be transferred onto a scale.
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Rope Transfer,Tumbler Cage,Gross Obstacle Course,Up & Over Car Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submerged Car Rotisserie, Fear Factor Sushi Bar, Wall Sweeper
programme.desc: Contestant is locked by their waist to the drivers seat and wrist to the steering wheel. Contestants determine the quantity and variety of Fear Factor Sushi they will have to eat. A six-inch wide beam will be sticking out perpendicular from a roof top.
programme.sub-title: Submerged Car Rotisserie, Fear Factor Sushi Bar, Wall Sweeper

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Dual Drop, Yo Yo Tank, Cattle Trench, Semi To Tanker Truck
programme.desc: Contestants will be seated in a helicopter and hang directly under the skids. One of the partners will be dangling by their ankle.
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Dual Drop, Yo Yo Tank, Cattle Trench, Semi To Tanker Truck

programme.title: Fear Factor: Houdini Hang w/ Car Slide & Pyro, Fear Factor Cocktail Bar, Rope Traverse and Toss
programme.desc: Fear Factor goes to Vegas! One stunt begins with a contestant hanging in mid-air with their wrists and ankles bound. In another stunt, contestants consume sickening cocktails.
programme.sub-title: Houdini Hang w/ Car Slide & Pyro, Fear Factor Cocktail Bar, Rope Traverse and Toss

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Blade Wall & Heli Rope Climb, Fear Factor Wedding Toast, Couples Car Into Lagoon
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the bottom ledge of plexi-glass wall that is suspended over the water from a crane. Newlywed couples will have to tear apart a Fear Factor wedding cake filled with insects.
programme.sub-title: Dual Blade Wall & Heli Rope Climb, Fear Factor Wedding Toast, Couples Car Into Lagoon

programme.title: Fear Factor: Water Beam, Triple Dump Tunnel, Heli Cargo Net Box
programme.desc: Contestants will stand on a beam above the water where they must make their way around a structure. Contestants will also climb through a plexi-glass tunnel.
programme.sub-title: Water Beam, Triple Dump Tunnel, Heli Cargo Net Box

programme.title: Fear Factor: Shower Beam, Sausage Fest, Dual pipe Ramp
programme.desc: Contestants must devour covered trays concealing six different types of horrifying Fear Factor Sausage. Team members will also be seated in separate stunt cars on opposite ends of a track for a thrilling game.
programme.sub-title: Shower Beam, Sausage Fest, Dual pipe Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Repel, Meat Locker, Mud Trough
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hog tied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker.
programme.sub-title: Heli Repel, Meat Locker, Mud Trough

programme.title: Fear Factor: Sikorsky Cargo Net, Tunnel Escape, Armored Car With Water
programme.desc: Million dollar heist episode! Contestants will be locked to a net that is dangling from the cargo ramp of a Sikorsky helicopter over water. Contestants must also make their way through a maze and climb into a car slowly filling with water.
programme.sub-title: Sikorsky Cargo Net, Tunnel Escape, Armored Car With Water

programme.title: Fear Factor: Flying Boat Flag Snag, Crab Dump Escape, Dual ice Box
programme.desc: Two contestants will be driving a boat down a path while connected to a helicopter. Contestants will also kneel in a plexi glass tank and stand in a plexi box that is suspended over water in this special blind date-themed episode!
programme.sub-title: Flying Boat Flag Snag, Crab Dump Escape, Dual ice Box

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dueling Minds
programme.desc: In the second battle of the semifinals, Akiza squares off against the professional profiler Commander Koda, but with her tournament life on the line, can Akiza outplay an opponent who claims to know her every move?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duel of the Dragons, Part 1
programme.desc: With the Fortune Cup Finale one win away, Yusei and Akiza get set to battle it out as Director Goodwin anxiously awaits the final Signer to reveal their Mark of the Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duel of the Dragons, Part 2
programme.desc: As the back-and-forth battle between Akiza and Yusei rages on, Yusei is forced to unleash his mighty Stardust Dragon in order to stop Akiza's grisly garden from squeezing his life points into submission.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Fortune Cup Finale: Part 1
programme.desc: With the Fortune Cup Finale about to kick into overdrive, Jack decides to clear the air and reveal the truth behind his escape from the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Fortune Cup Finale, Part 2
programme.desc: With the finish line of the Fortune Cup fast approaching, Yusei and Jack find themselves on a collision course with destiny as they race to unlock the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Web of Deceit, Part 1
programme.desc: After defeating Jack to win the Fortune Cup Finale, Yusei is challenged to a Shadow Duel by an underground duelist whose mind has been taken over by the Dark Signers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Web of Deceit, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and his robed rival rages on, Yusei must rely on his deck if he plans to survive this Shadow Duel and uncover the truth behind the Dark Signers sinister scheme to destroy the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Good Cop, Bad Cop
programme.desc: After agreeing to help Yusei meet with Director Goodwin, Officer Trudge unknowingly becomes one of the Dark Signers' drones and challenges a wounded Jack Atlas to a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Hoping to gain Yusei's trust, Director Goodwin decides to share with him the secrets behind the origin of the Satellite Sector and the ongoing war between Signer and Dark Signer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Reunion Duel
programme.desc: After returning to the Satellite Sector, Yusei meets up with his old friend Crow and soon finds himself in a tag team Turbo Duel with Sector Security.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei and Crow set off to confront the Dark Signers in an effort to stop them from destroying the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 2
programme.desc: In an effort to save the Satellite Sector from being destroyed, Yusei agrees to face off against a former friend turned Dark Signer in a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei confronts his former friend Kalin about their past in an effort to stop him from awakening the Army of Shadows.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 4
programme.desc: The safety of the world hangs in the balance as Yusei tries to figure out a way to outduel and outmaneuver the unstoppable power of Kalin's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Supersensory Shakedown
programme.desc: Leo is forced to take part in an extrasensory examination with the leader of the Arcadia Movement. Can Leo pass this pop quiz, or will this psychic showdown with Sayer leave Leo locked up forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Digging Deeper, Part 1
programme.desc: With Lazar's creepy clowns about to crack Crow's defense, Crow hatches a plan to lull his opponent into a false sense of security so that his feathered friends can swoop in and swipe the last of Lazar's life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Digging Deeper, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei gets caught up in a web of lies after agreeing to square off against Roman, the leader of the Dark Signers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Digging Deeper, Part 3
programme.desc: With the safety of his friends literally hanging in the balance, Yusei must figure out a way to squash Roman's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him and his pals to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash of the Dragons, Part 1
programme.desc: Luna gears up to face Devack in a Shadow Duel, but before the first card can be thrown, Luna is transported back to the Spirit World, leaving her pint-sized brother Leo the tall task of taking down this Dark Signer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash of the Dragons, Part 2
programme.desc: As Luna searches the Spirit World for a way to free Ancient Fairy Dragon from her stone prison, Leo searches his deck for a card combo that will help him defeat Devack and his army of apes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Signs of Time
programme.desc: Luna and her new found friend Torunka hatch a plan to free Regulus from King Zeman's minus curse. Meanwhile, back in the Satellite Sector, Leo calls upon his Power Tool Dragon to help him dismantle Devack's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 1
programme.desc: When Luna's plan to free Ancient Fairy Dragon falls apart, Regulus must come to her rescue in order to save her and the Spirit World from Zeman's minus curse.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 2
programme.desc: Carly sets out hoping to uncover the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon, but after digging up some damaging dirt on the Arcadia Movement, she soon finds herself squaring off in a psychic duel with Sayer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Spider, Part 1
programme.desc: Sayer signs up for a Shadow Duel against a Dark Signer who's out for revenge while Akiza agrees to battle a dark and sinister supermodel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Spider, Part 2
programme.desc: As the Dark Signer double duel draws to a climactic close, Carly and Misty unfold a catastrophic card combo that could send Akiza and Sayer to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 1
programme.desc: After Akiza falls into a state of unconsciousness, her father turns to Yusei in a last ditch effort to wake his beloved daughter from her catatonic condition.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Signers presses on, Yusei turns to his trusty Stardust Dragon in an effort to keep the power of Akiza's Black Rose Dragon at bay.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 3
programme.desc: With Yusei, Jack, Akiza and Luna all gathered together, Director Goodwin seizes the moment and decides to shed some light on the dark and formidable foes the four Signers will soon be battling.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 4
programme.desc: In an effort to rid the Satellite Sector of the Dark Signers, Crow ventures out and challenges a sinister looking sneak to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 1
programme.desc: Crow challenges the newest member of the Dark Signers to a Turbo Duel, but before Crow's Blackwings can even take flight, his opponent unleashes an aerial assault of his own.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 2
programme.desc: As the sky-high battle between Crow and Greiger heats up, Crow looks to elevate his game in order to ground Greiger's aerial attacks before they send him to the Netherworld forever.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Crow turns to his feathered friends in a last ditch effort to take out Greiger's Earthbound Immortal. Can Crow and his Blackwing's rise to the occasion?
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Score to Settle, Part 1
programme.desc: Haunted by the memories of his last battle with Kalin, Yusei looks to bury the past by agreeing to duel his former friend in a rematch. Can Yusei defeat Kalin and seal the tower that this Dark Signer is guarding?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Score to Settle, Part 2
programme.desc: As the rematch between Kalin and Yusei continues, Yusei must find a way to out-think and out-maneuver the dark power of Kalin's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Destiny's Will, Part 1
programme.desc: Roman challenges Yusei to a Shadow Duel at the site of the original Ener-D Reactor. Meanwhile, Director Goodwin decides to make an unexpected visit to the Satellite Sector to settle some unfinished business he has with his Dark Signer brother.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Destiny's Will, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Roman rages on, Roman takes a time out to reveal the truth behind the original Ener-D Reactor's meltdown and the role Yusei's father played.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Shadows of Doubt, Part 1
programme.desc: Jack agrees to Turbo Duel Carly in an effort to defeat the darkness that has taken control of her. Can Jack rid the evil that has come to possess this one-time roving reporter?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Shadows of Doubt, Part 2
programme.desc: Jack kicks his duel into overdrive and summons his Red Dragon Archfiend in a desperate attempt to free Carly from the Dark Signers' control.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Truth and Consequences, Part 1
programme.desc: Hoping to finally find out the whereabouts of her long-lost brother, Misty challenges Akiza to a Shadow Duel in a maze of mirrors.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Truth and Consequences, Part 2
programme.desc: After unlocking Akiza's psychic powers, Sayer sets his sights on using them to get even with the Dark Signers for destroying the Arcadia Movement.

programme.title: Gloves Off
programme.desc: Following his boxing trainer’s sudden death during his championship fight, Doug has inherited a crumbling debt-ridden gym, packed full of a mixed bag of crazy would-be pugilists.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: Everyone Says I Love You
programme.desc: A New York girl sets her father up with a beautiful woman in a troubled marriage while her stepsister gets engaged. Starring: Woody Allen, Goldie Hawn, Julia Roberts, Edward Norton, Drew Barrymore, Natasha Lyonne, Natalie Portman

programme.title: Karaoke Man
programme.desc: When an introverted comic book illustrator discovers that the costume of an obscure Eastern European superhero supplies him with the courage to sing karaoke without fear, he uses his new-found voice to woo a cute waitress.

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: The Winning Season: The Winning Season
programme.desc: The story of a washed up basketball coach who must learn to overcome his love of booze and his overdeveloped macho nature in order to re-invent himself as a real man and give a bunch of no-hopers a shot at a WINNING SEASON!

programme.title: You, Me and Him
programme.desc: Olivia is a career-driven lawyer in a stable relationship with her younger girlfriend, Alex. Olivia has no interest in children - until the day she finds herself sobbing uncontrollably over a friend's pregnancy.

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: School for Scoundrels
programme.desc: A young guy short on luck enrolls in a class to build confidence to help win over the girl of his dreams, which becomes complicated when his teacher has the same agenda.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of Bolton Sea Cadets
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Bolton to check out the alleged haunting at Sea Cadets academy.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Weir Mill
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visits Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team is ready for act II at the New Mills Arts Theatre. With so much apparent activity happening at this unassuming theatre, the team just couldn't leave when so much more could happen.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits at The Lord Eldon
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to the old town of Knutsford, Cheshire to investigate the historic Lord Eldon Inn, hoping to contact the spirit of Sarah Ann Pollitt who is said to haunt the pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Monks and Demons at The Rutland Arms Hotel
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team journeys to Nottingham and the historic Rutland Arms Hotel. The pub and hotel have seen several centuries of change, and with that change came tragedy.
programme.sub-title: Monks and Demons at The Rutland Arms Hotel

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Final Session at Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travel back in time to The Galleries of Justice in Nottingham. This was a one stop shop for justice where criminals were held awaiting trial.
programme.sub-title: Final Session at Galleries of Justice

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.
programme.sub-title: Underground World Of The City of Caves

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team travels to North Wales and the Tivoli Theatre in Flint for a night of haunting entertainment.
programme.sub-title: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Old Glen and Milner Curse
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Shipley, West Yorkshire to investigate The Old Glen House Pub.
programme.sub-title: The Old Glen and Milner Curse

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visit Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.
programme.sub-title: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion
programme.desc: The team encounters a spirit member joining them on the thermal imaging camera and appearing to leave its ghostly hand print behind.
programme.sub-title: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Long Lost Treasure at Jessops Old Mill and Auction House
programme.desc: The ghost dimension team visits Batley, West Yorkshire to investigate a location where it may not be the building that's haunted but the items that reside within.
programme.sub-title: Long Lost Treasure at Jessops Old Mill and Auction House

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 1
programme.desc: Four floors of terror! Objects from around the world are at home in the museum, but what is attached to them, which now roams the floors and corridors after dark?
programme.sub-title: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 2
programme.desc: With activity sending the team into a spin on the top floor, is there something attached to the museum's main attraction, the mummy?
programme.sub-title: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls of One Melling Road
programme.desc: The team heads to Liverpool to help a restaurant uncover what could be haunting there. Bex and Sean encounter the spirit of a white lady in the private quarters.
programme.sub-title: Lost Souls of One Melling Road

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 29
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a gorgeous 19th Century Church which is up for sale, a plot of land in Middlesex with planning permission for two one-bedroom flats and a studio flat in the heart of London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 17
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Stoke-on-Trent, a flat in Morden with a steep staircase and a house in Kent with a catch.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 26
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a bungalow in Devon with hidden depths, a house in Dover and a property in Preston with a problem in the cellar.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 23
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a property in Crewe, the finished result of a house we first saw in 2005 in South London and a shop in Basingstoke.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Lucy & Martin travel to Devon where there's a cottage that looks like a good catch but will the buyer have to be local?

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 12
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see a mid terrace in need of a complete overhaul in Chatham, Kent; there's a flat in a gothic-style Victorian house in Sydenham, London with delusions of grandeur and a pair of semis with some potential subsidance in Fenham, Newcastle.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a beautiful property in Cornwall with a not so beautiful interior, a large one bedroom flat in Kensal Green, and an odd-shaped house in Huddersfield.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a little piece of English history in Derbyshire, an old farm cottage in Banbury and a house in Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 26
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts go to Helston in Cornwall in search of the perfect rural retreat, then to Crystal Palace to view a two bedroom basement flat and finally they go to Bury to look at a house which may be the worst on a very nice street.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see a two bedroom mid-terrace in Dresden in Stoke on Trent; in Sydenham in Crystal Palace a ground floor flat in a Victorian building; and a very large but flood-prone riverside plot in Chesterfield on the banks of the River Rother.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 22
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a derelict chapel in Rastrick, West Yorkshire, a splendid Georgian semi in Derby city centre and a mid terrace investment opportunity near the Thames barrier in London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 9
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a Victorian villa in Derby, a flat in South West London and a 2 bed apartment in Sunderland.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Kent, Essex and Markham.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Lancashire with a damp problem, a handsome house in Kent and a house in Derby that needs some modernisation.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a curious building in Stoke-on-Trent, a flat in Crystal Palace fit for a Queen and a four bedroom house in Glamorgan.

programme.title: Jungle B
programme.desc: A boy raised by wild animals tries to adapt to human village life.

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: The Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: A mad, disfigured composer seeks love with a lovely young opera singer.

programme.title: Jabberwocky
programme.desc: A young peasant, with no interest in adventure or fortune, is mistaken as the kingdom's only hope when a horrible monster threatens the countryside.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.title: Small Time Crooks
programme.desc: A loser of a crook and his wife strike it rich when a botched bank job's cover business becomes a spectacular success. Starring: Woody Allen, Tracey Ullman, Hugh Grant, Michael Rapaport, Tony Darrow, Laurine Towler

programme.title: Satan's Cheerleaders
programme.desc: The janitor at a local high school is actually the scout for a coven of Satanists on the lookout for a virgin to sacrifice. One day he kidnaps the cheerleading squad to use for their rituals. However, one of the cheerleaders is actually a witch.

programme.title: Creepshow 2
programme.desc: Three more bone-chilling tales that include a vengeful wooden Native American, a monstrous blob in a lake, and a hitchhiker who wants revenge and will not die. Starring:George Kennedy, Lois Chiles, Domenick John

programme.title: The Lair Of The White Worm
programme.desc: After a mysterious skull is unearthed, it's stolen and used by its new owner to worship a pagan god who hungers for the taste of virginal flesh in this cheeky horror-comedy.

programme.title: Hunter: Fagin 1986
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: 62 Hours of Terror
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Death Machine
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Beautiful & the Dead: Part 1
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Beautiful & the Dead: Part 2
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Return of Typhoon Thompson
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Saturday Night Special
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Overnight Sensation
programme.desc: Hunter attempts to apprehend a vicious robbery suspect while he clashes with a vindictive reporter bent on destroying the detective's career.

programme.title: Hunter: Change Partners and Dance
programme.desc: Detectives Hunter and McCall must work individually to investigate the killing of a police officer after they are separated as partners by their new precinct leader.

programme.title: Hunter: Crime of Passion
programme.desc: McCall belives that a man accused of murdering his wife is innocent.

programme.title: Hunter: The Castro Connection
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall attempt to break a cocaine syndicate apparently being run by one of Hunter's most trusted ex-partners.

programme.title: Hunter: High Noon in L.A.
programme.desc: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Hunter: From San Francisco with Love
programme.desc: A beautiful San Francisco police detective aids Hunter and McCall in solving a series of puzzling murders apparently connected to the estate of a deceased millionaire.

programme.title: Hunter: True Confessions
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.

programme.title: Hunter: Love, Hate and Shorty James
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall try to protect their informant, Sporty James, from his own greed after he blackmails a ruthless cocaine dealer who's responsible for a murder.

programme.title: Hunter: The Contract
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist who wants to control their methods of rescuing his abducted wife.

programme.title: Hunter: The Cradle Will Rock
programme.desc: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In the last episode of the season, Tiff tests a Caterham Roadsport 175 by driving essential medical supplies around the country; Tom drives SEAT's new family saloon; Jason enjoys the monstrous Lamborghini LP670-4 Super Veloce.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato hold a knock-out tournament to see if the 570hp Mercedes SLS AMG can beat its rivals from Aston Martin, Bentley and Jaguar. Jonny Smith meets Swedish rally legend Stig Blomquist for some ice driving lessons

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Fifth Gear presenter Jonny Smith is granted access-all-areas to Kia's top secret test facility in the Californian desert where he investigates the lengths manufacturers go to in the quest for ever greater reliability.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 16
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is in France, experiencing the action packed world of Rallycross; a cross between rallying and circuit racing, where 650bhp machines battle door to door.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 11
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson heads to the German HQ of the Dakar rally winning Mini X-Raid team, to experience the three toughest jobs in motorsport. She'll learn how to be a navigator, mechanic and driver before taking on Dakar rally legend Nani Roma

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 13
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato hold a track battle between two executive cars with over 1000bhp between them. The brand new Audi RS6 and Mercedes E63 AMG are both designed to demolish autobahns

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Tiff Needell conducts a shocking crash test to show why everyone should make sure their next car has electronic stability control. Vicki Butler-Henderson is at an exclusive motor show in Monte Carlo, where she reveals the latest Pagani hypercar.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 14
programme.desc: Jonny enters the world of professional drifting as competes in the famous Gatebil show in Norway, driving a specially modified BMW M5. To give himself a fighting chance, he first arranges some tuition from the 2011 British Drift Champion Matt Carter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell host a battle of the best cheap hot hatches on sale. The Ford Fiesta ST, RenaultSport Clio and Peugeot 208 GTI are all thrashed to the limit before Tiff and Jason reveal the champion.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 18
programme.desc: Tiff is joined by German motoring legend and 'Queen of the Nurburgring' Sabine Schmitz for a head to head battle between our two favourite sports cars of the last year – the BMW M6 and Porsche 911.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is at the biggest American car show in the world – which takes place just outside a small town in Sweden. He judges the prestigious best in show competition, goes on a late night cruise and tests the brand new Corvette Grand Sport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Karun Chandhok test four bare essential sports cars to find out which is the ultimate way to get some track day thrills for around £50,000. The Fifth Gear team test Ford's latest hot hatch, the Fiesta ST.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by ex-Formula One driver Karun Chandhok to battle it out on the track in two of the most sort-after super sports cars; Porsche 911 GT3 RS vs Nissan GT-R Nismo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell hold a high octane track test of three brand new super glamorous convertibles from Audi, Maserati and Mercedes. Vicki Butler-Henderson races wheel to wheel with World Superbike hotshot Chaz Davies

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes behind the scenes at the gruelling Isle of Man TT motorbike race, and spends the day with TT hero and 19 times winner John McGuinness. Tiff Needell races around the infamous TT circuit in the brand new Subaru BRZ sports car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato is in Iceland being taught how to race a brutal Formula Off-Road buggy up a cliff of volcanic rock by a former champion. Tiff Needell is joined by former Le Mans winner Guy Smith to test a brand new version of Bentley's best selling car

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 18
programme.desc: In this special rally themed show, Jason Plato and Tiff Needell swap race track for rally stage as they learn to master the art of rally driving. They're taught advanced driving skills by triple British Rally Champion Mark Higgins

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Jonny Smith reveals the secrets of 21 st century car crash testing. He goes behind the scenes at a crash test performed by experts EuroNCAP, before conducting his own shocking crash test between a car and a van.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Denmark experiencing the exciting world of motorbike speedway with triple world champion Nicki Pederson. Jonny Smith visits Ferrari's hi-tech aluminium factory before taking their latest California supercar out

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives. These women all had a fatal fixation.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Deadly Delinquents
programme.desc: In the tormented mind of a young school girl, jealousy can turn to a murderous rage. These deadly girls turn on their own and kill their friends. This is the brutal world of deadly delinquents.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Baby-Faced Killers
programme.desc: These baby-faced girls may look childish and innocent, but behind their little girl smiles lies a darkness most adults never experience. When their inner turmoil bubbles to the surface, they become unlikely criminals.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Love
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion, one that sits in the core of our soul and fills our lives with hope. But when love turns sour, the results can be deadly. In an act of revenge, these deadly women unite with one common goal, to kill.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, a serial killer stalked lone victims in the dead of night, his hunting ground the suburbs of Washington, D.C., his target, anyone who owned a car.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Murder of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911 Truth who present their case that the WTC towers were brought down by controlled demolition on 9/11.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?
programme.sub-title: The Dangers of EMF (Electro Magnetic Frequencies)

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is a powerfully rich cabal with a globalist agenda conspiring to destroy sovereign nations and impose authoritarian rule?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bigfoot
programme.desc: Two prominent Bigfoot trackers and a cryptozoologist affirm the existence of this shy and elusive creature and relate several close encounters with Sasquatch.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Freemasons
programme.desc: Are the Freemasons a harmless fraternity whose members busy themselves by raising money for children's hospitals or a satanic cult whose tentacles and enslave mankind?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The O'Hare UFO Incident
programme.desc: Richard investigates a UFO sighting over Chicago's O'Hare airport that was witnessed by dozens of people, including an airline captain, his crew and several airport officials.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Mokele Mbembe
programme.desc: Mokele Mbembe means able to stem the flow of rivers. The Pygmies there say they have encountered just such a creature and according to their descriptions, this behemoth is a dead ringer for an Apotosaurus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several independent researchers about the efforts of international bankers to control the course of history and enslave humanity through their monopoly of the creation of money and the manipulation of the money supply.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Bilderbergs
programme.desc: A glimpse backstage at the highly secretive annual gathering of the world's richest and most powerful movers and shakers.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: The Why Files: The Dodleston Messages from the Past and Future
programme.desc: AJ investigates a high school teacher receiving messages from the past.
programme.sub-title: The Dodleston Messages from the Past and Future

programme.title: The Why Files: The Most Mysterious Children in History

programme.sub-title: The Most Mysterious Children in History

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Shroud of Turin
programme.desc: Is this famous piece of linen cloth the actual burial cloth of Jesus Christ or a clever Medieval hoax?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Are we really running out of oil, or does the government and Big Oil just want us to think we are? Two proponents of the abiotic oil theory argue that oil is not a fossil fuel and actually replenishes itself deep within the earth.
programme.sub-title: Are We Running Out of Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Black Death

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Al Capone and Prohibition
programme.desc: It’s the start of Prohibition. Several criminals grab the opportunity to create veritable empires by means of contraband liquor.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Fall of Quebec
programme.desc: 1756. The beginning of the Seven Years War, which amongst others sets France against England.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Gold Rush
programme.desc: In a saw mill belonging to Swiss pioneer John Sutter, James W. Marshall, a carpenter finds pieces of shining metal in the stream next to the saw mill: it’s gold!

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Gutenberg and the Printing Press
programme.desc: 1450. Mayence. Johannes Gutenberg has been working on creating a printing press for more than 2 years.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Kursk, the URSS Strikes Back
programme.desc: The Battle of Kursk, pitting Nazis against Soviets, is one of the real turning points of the Second World War.

programme.title: Final 24

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Fight or flight"
programme.desc: In the finale of season two, the team spend the night at a former RAF base. Bangs on request, footsteps, and more are encountered; and the venue has a strange effect on some of the team, with one AYH member getting the fright of their lives.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Something foreboding"
programme.desc: Sara, Phil and the Are You Haunted team head to South Yorkshire, where a venue with military connections awaits investigation. Based on personal experiences, will the team think this venue is haunted, or not; and will you agree with their decision?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Are you kidding me!?
programme.desc: A ghostly white lady, phantom footsteps, and more have been reported at this quirky haunted guest house. Fellow investigator Adam Morgan joins the team as they witness for themselves some of the reported phenomenon. Who will Sara put in charge tonight?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Can you not?"
programme.desc: Sara, Phil, and the rest of the AYH team head north, to Northumberland. Here they investigate a location that has for many years been the scene of supposed paranormal activity. And one of the team celebrates a landmark birthday. But who?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Total creep out!"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team is back this time with a rather unusual haunted venue, providing a very uneasy atmosphere. With reports of phantom footsteps, unexplained voices, and a full apparition. But what will the team uncover for themselves?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something's in here
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team head to the West Midlands to investigate a former chapel. Unexplained noises, footsteps, shadows, and things being moved have all been reported. But which member of the team will Sara choose to lead this investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Hide and seek"
programme.desc: An old venue with a different past awaits the team in this episode, where among other reported incidents, the ghost of a mischievous little boy has been seen and heard, playing. Plus, voices and unexplained footsteps have been encountered.

programme.title: Into The Unknown: Residual Hauntings
programme.desc: Connor and Zach investigate The Farrar Elementary School in Maxwell, Iowa to explore the concept behind Residual Hauntings. It is said to be haunted by the former students who experienced a tragic secret.

programme.title: Into The Unknown: Spirit Communication
programme.desc: Connor and Zach investigate the Old Lake County Jail in Crown Point, Indiana, where the famous gangster, John Dillinger escaped in 1934. This jail is burdened by the weight of murders, suicides, and unforgiving cold steel.

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Haunted Parade
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Hoylake and investigate a building known as The Parade. Dating back to 1909, this once former school, still seems to have ghostly pupils and teachers taking class.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Carnfield Hall
programme.desc: Carnfield Hall is a country house dating from the 15th and 16th Centuries. This private residence turn event hall is using its paranormal activity to draw in business. Are these spirits the old residents?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Amie Hoffman
programme.desc: Teenager Amie Hoffman disappears after work one night. Police are on the case but when a family friend calls psychic Nancy Weber, she sees Amie’s murder in a bizarre vision.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: In Thomaston Georgia, when local roofer Thomas Bragg is found murdered in his bed, the whole town is talking. The police suspect his wife, but they have no witnesses, no leads and no murder weapon.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: What Lies Below
programme.desc: When popular high school student Robert Piest disappears after his shift at a local drugstore, police in Des Plaines, Illinois, ask psychic Carol Broman for help.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Margie Calciano
programme.desc: Detective Robert Wanner consults psychic Lauren Thibodeau to help with a case that has left him stumped. Surprisingly she instead offers clues on a cold case that’s been worrying Wanner for years.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rachel Domas
programme.desc: Can a veteran psychic and a rookie cop crack a case of a missing fourteen-year-old girl? Rachel Domas misses her school bus and walks the 3 miles home. She’s never seen again.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Alexis Burke
programme.desc: The police receive a call from John Burke, his twenty-one year old wife Alexis has been missing for three days. She took off in the family car after a fight and hasn’t been seen since.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Penney Serra
programme.desc: Twenty-one year old Penney Serra was brutally murdered in a parking garage. The police thought it was an open and shut case – witnesses had seen a suspect flee.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lynsey Quy
programme.desc: Lynsey Quy a young mother and wife mysteriously vanishes on Christmas day, her husband reports her missing, the police start their search.
